repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Development and Alumni Affairs records

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Development and Alumni Affairs

did.abstract: Records of the Cornell College of Agriculture's Development and Alumni Affairs office include correspondence, proposals, minutes, reports, donor lists, accounts, date books, and other materials relating to corporate and alumni gifts, scholarships, the College of Agriculture and Life Sciences Fund, and other subjects. Names included are Laing E. Kennedy, A. Lee Thompson, William I. Myers, Lansing P. Shield, W. Keith Kennedy, A. Bradford Carruth, Wendell G. Earle, and Elmer L. Townsend. Includes photographs and slides of various events and people, such as David Call and of campus buildings, including the demolition of Roberts Hall in 1990.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Records of the Cornell College of Agriculture's Development and Alumni Affairs office include correspondence, proposals, minutes, reports, donor lists, accounts, date books, and other materials relating to corporate and alumni gifts, scholarships, the College of Agriculture and Life Sciences Fund, and other subjects. Names included are Laing E. Kennedy, A. Lee Thompson, William I. Myers, Lansing P. Shield, W. Keith Kennedy, A. Bradford Carruth, Wendell G. Earle, and Elmer L. Townsend. Includes photographs and slides of various events and people, such as David Call and of campus buildings, including the demolition of Roberts Hall in 1990. Collection also includes photographs, chiefly of CALS events from the early 1980s until 2004. Events include reunions, award banquets, Dean-Alumni Get Togethers, and conferences.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: New York State College of Agriculture and Life Sciences. Development and Alumni Affairs records, #21-2-1767. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

Requests for pledges to William I. Myers Professorship
Wendell G. Earle testimonial dinner correspondence
Wendell G. Earle testimonial dinner menu, programs, photograph

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photographs chiefly taken at CALS events from the early 1980s until 2004. Events include Dean-Alumni Get-Togethers, reunions, commencements, and award banquets.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Two photo albums were rehoused into two boxes in box 10.

did.unittitle: Dean Beverly Galloway's portrait - College of Agriculture and Life Sciences Alumni Association meeting - photos,
"Herakles at Ithaca" Dedication - Jason Seley - photos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Subjects of photographs include displays, views of campus, and events.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Two 3 x 5 in. negatives of photographs in box 4, folder 6.

did.unittitle: Agriculture and Life Sciences staff and alumni
Chinese Agricultural Education Delegation - photograph and flyer,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes pictures of Wendell Earle, Bob Bitz, Philip Coombe, Jr., Michael Nolan, Dan Fessenden, Richard Call, Bob Call, and Robert Smith.

processinfo.p: Programs originally found in photo album rehoused into box 1 of box 10. Archivist supplied title.
